pareto_quality_latency: Pareto frontier: quality (nDCG@10) vs latency per method.
action_distribution: Distribution of actions selected by the B-P-SAFE router.
rejected_action_reasons: Breakdown of why alternative actions were rejected by the safety constraints.
p_gain_calibration: Calibration plot for gain probability predictions.
p_harm_calibration: Calibration plot for harm probability predictions.
oracle_gap: Oracle gap: nDCG difference between P-SAFE and oracle routing, and fraction closed.
graph_contribution: Graph expansion metrics: unique relevant docs found, action wins/losses.
quality_retention_vs_latency_saving: Trade-off: quality retained vs latency saved relative to always-on hybrid.
